name: @forgeax/parity-forgeax
description: Right fixture for the three.js pixel-parity bench (feat-20260512). Renders an unlit cube via @forgeax/engine-runtime with locked 8-dimension parameters (D-P6) mirroring apps/parity/threejs (D-P5 case C: 0 light => PBR_FALLBACK_WGSL constant-shading path). Workspace skeleton only at M1 T-004; the full fixture lands at M2 T-006; the evaluator SDK at M2 T-008.

bundle-size.reason: fixture-only bundle; size variance is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: static-frame fixture (rotation locked at (0.3, 0.5, 0); no raf loop). FPS measurement is hello-triangle territory (K-12 baseline anchor)

gate.reason: no package-level binary gate; pixel-parity validation runs via scripts/bench/pixel-parity.mjs at the CI metrics-validate job (M3 T-016)

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; threshold spike data lives in plan-decisions.md (T-011), not in this workspace
